CustomField.formula: CASE( leaseworks__Deal_Status__c , "ADM Approval", IMAGE("https://leaseworks-carlyle--pc.sandbox.file.force.com/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_Png&versionId=0681w000002lR2Y&operationContext=CHATTER&contentId=05T1w000009FBmK", "AD Approved",50,80), "LOI Signed", IMAGE("https://leaseworks-carlyle--pc.sandbox.file.force.com/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_Png&versionId=0681w000002lR2d&operationContext=CHATTER&contentId=05T1w000009FBme", "Pending BAC",50,80), "LOI", IMAGE("https://leaseworks-carlyle--pc.sandbox.file.force.com/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_Png&versionId=0681w000002lR2B&operationContext=CHATTER&contentId=05T1w000009FBld","Pending AD",50,80), "Documentation", IMAGE("https://leaseworks-carlyle--pc.sandbox.file.force.com/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_Png&versionId=0681w000002lR4Z&operationContext=CHATTER&contentId=05T1w000009FBzE","BAC Approved",50,80), "")
CustomField.label: AD / BAC Status
